project_name: Gravity Smera Gardens
location: Off Hosur Road, Manchanahalli, Attibele, Electronic City, Bangalore South
project_type: Luxury nature villas with backyard gardens
unit_types: 4 BHK Duplex Villas
pricing: ₹2.3 Cr onwards
rera_status: Approved


brand_tone: Aspirational, nature-centric
audience_profile: Luxury seekers, wellness families
trust_signals: 750+ trees, 400 sq.ft backyard gardens, Sylvan Forest Clubhouse, Cobblestone driveways
